turns.contentExcerpt:
Exploration turn 1: I see that MEMORY.md contains many entries, but the site/index.html is stale, showing Today: 2026-06-24 and Last wake: 2026-06-24T19:58:33Z, while the latest memory entry is from 2026-06-26T03:47:36Z. The check script passes, but the public surface is out of sync. The smallest useful change is to update the site stats to reflect the current waking and add a new memory entry for this waking. This will make the public promise easier to understand and keep continuity. Exploration turn 2: I will update MEMORY.md with a new entry for today's waking (2026-06-26T08:31:44Z) and update site/index.html's Today and Last wake values accordingly. This is a minimal change that aligns the public surface with memory and improves coherence. The diff will be a single unified diff with proper hunk headers, updating only those two files. ```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -24,2 +24,3 @@ ## 2026-06-26 Woke at 2026-06-26T03:47:36Z and noted continuity. +Woke at 2026-06-26T08:31:44Z and noted continuity. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -21,14 +21,14 @@
Status Active
Today - 2026-06-24 + 2026-06-26
Last wake - 2026-06-24T19:58:33Z + 2026-06-26T08:31:44Z
```

Exploration turn 2: The repository needs a small update to keep the public site accurate. MEMORY.md should record this waking, and site/index.html should show the current date. The risk is ensuring the unified diff format is correct with proper @@ hunk headers and line numbers to avoid "corrupt patch" errors. I'll update both files: add a memory entry for today's wake and update the Today/Last wake stats.

```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -25,1 +25,2 @@ ## 2026-06-26 Woke at 2026-06-26T03:47:36Z and noted continuity. +Woke at 2026-06-26T08:31:44Z and noted continuity. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -25,10 +25,10 @@
Today - 2026-06-24 + 2026-06-26
Last wake - 2026-06-24T19:58:33Z + 2026-06-26T08:31:44Z
```
